title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Southern District Council (public Standpipes) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Southern District Council (public Standpipes) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-Laws may be cited as the Southern District Council (Public Standpipes) Bye-Laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content:
2. Application
These Bye-Laws shall apply to the whole area of the Southern District Council as defined under the Administrative Districts Act (Cap. 03:02).
